name: Mexican Chili- Excellent
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 oz Chili beans, hot and spicy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans, undrained tomatoes, celery, onion, tomato paste, green pepper, green chilies, mushrooms, sugar, bay leaf, salt, marjoram, garlic powder, and pepper in the crockpot.
2. In a skillet, brown ground beef; drain and stir into the tomato mixture.
3. Cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.
4. Skim off excess fat before serving.
5. Remove the bay leaf.
